text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Osaka Hai behind us, Maruzensky is now
training harder than ever.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I need to take a break. I've been going
full steam ahead for too long.
choice_data_list: You do seem more intense than usual.
You do seem more intense than usual.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's not like I've become super serious about
training or anything...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm just having too much fun and can't control
myself. My match with Rudolf was so exciting!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: So chillaxed! Everything's fine!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But there is something I'm a little concerned about...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she says this, I follow Maruzensky's gaze to
find...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... pant... huff...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: One more!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: M-me, too!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I know the Yasuda Kinen is coming up soon, and
those two are trying their best, but...
choice_data_list:
They do seem to be pushing themselves pretty
hard.

They do seem to be pushing themselves pretty
hard.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I have to help them out however I can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, while I'm heading to my room
after work...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh! Maruzensky's trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It's Grass! Grass is in trouble!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: How does it look, doctor?

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
You'll be just fine. It looks like you twisted it a
little.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whew! I'm glad it's not a major injury.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Indeed...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Thank you for calling the school doctor!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry for the trouble.
choice_data_list: It looks like you pushed yourself too hard.
It looks like you pushed yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...We need to get faster, you know?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Watching Maruzensky and the student council
president race right in front of us was... It was
really amazing...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But it also made us realize just how far we still
have to go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that they're pushing themselves too hard
in a rush to catch up to Maruzensky and Rudolf.
choice_data_list: I get it, but you can't become reckless.
I get it, but you can't become reckless.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: We're very aware of that, but still...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder and Special Week's expressions
tell me that they aren't going to stop.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's clear that they lack a very important detail.
choice_data_list: Wait here. I'll be right back.
Wait here. I'll be right back.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Grass! Are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
M-Maruzensky! Did you come all the way from
home?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
My trainer called and told me what happened!
How is your injury?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
My trainer called and told me what happened!
How is your injury?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder explains her condition and the
circumstances that led up to it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: So you got impatient, huh...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad you're trying so hard. Having strong
rivals fires me up too...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But you guys seem to be missing something
important right now.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: What is it? Tell us, please.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you exactly what I mean, so come hang
out with me for a minute.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Um, Maruzensky, when you say we're missing
something...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You guys watched me and Rudolf race, and felt
that you couldn't match up, right?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Did you feel anything else?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Like... what?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I had the best time racing with Rudolf! We both
lost ourselves in the race, fighting with everything
we had...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Without saying a word, we both knew we were
having such a blast that we didn't want the race
to end!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's that enjoyment that always pushes me to go
faster.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I want to run faster because it feels good. I want
to win races because it's fun.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Right now, you guys are in such a hurry to get
better, you're forgetting to have fun.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: And that means, if we raced now, I'm sure I'd win.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember the feeling of watching me,
with excitement gleaming in your eyes?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You both said you would chase after me and kept
running happily every day...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I know that you both still have that joy for
running.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I have been pushing myself hard lately, forcing myself to run until I can barely even stand...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Grass! Once your leg feels better, let's run and
time each other again!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Let's be happy getting faster bit by bit, just like
we used to!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
So... having fun is what pushes you forward. I
guess it's true what they say, "What you like you
will do well."

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Instead of being impatient to catch up, we should
enjoy the chase...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Thinking about it that way makes me want
to get out there and run right now!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Yeah, I can't wait to get back to training!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm glad I could be of help!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: And thank you for calling me here, Trainer!
choice_data_list:
Of course! You're the one they look up to, after
all.

Of course! You're the one they look up to, after
all.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: And thank you for calling me here, Trainer!
choice_data_list:
Of course! You're the one they look up to, after
all.

Of course! You're the one they look up to, after
all.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to keep trying my best to be a reliable
big sister to my adorable schoolmates!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
By the way, Maruzensky, why did you bring us
here?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Isn't it obvious? There's no better place to
embrace your youth than outdoors, right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
C'mon! Pump your fist in the air and sing the
words, "Don't you... forget about me!" ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I see! Okay, here I go... Don't you... forget me!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Um... I'll remember you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the younger students get back on track
and resume their training for the Yasuda Kinen in
high spirits.
